case_title: VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC. VS. CHERYL GOODWIN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODWIN, CHERYL DBA MJ RECOVERY GOODWIN, CONNIE E DBA MJ RECOVERY $3,078.00 PRINCIPAL, $207.48 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,285.48, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED ITS CLAIM AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-17-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOODWIN, CHERYL DBA MJ RECOVERY
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2009 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-30-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF VORTEX INDUSTRIES INC.
